Dialog.name: MND_BARRIER
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The path to the next floor is blocked off...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_ACCESS_MITU_FIR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}It seems to continue on upwards, but the path is blocked...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Looks like there's no way to progress any further right now, so let's stop here for tonight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}We've still managed to cover a lot of ground. Well done, everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_YUKARI_FIRS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}Guess that's it, then. But how are we gonna get past this roadblock?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_JUNPEI_FIRS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}Tartarus changes every day, right? So maybe it won't be blocked off tomorrow night, or somethin'.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_YUKARI_FIRS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4031 0 0}Unfortunately, that logic doesn't seem to apply here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Some floors have fixed structures and layouts. This appears to be one of them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Some other factor may have caused this. I'll look into it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_JUNPEI_FIRS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2066 0 0}Guess we just gotta wait. C'mon, let's bounce, {f 4 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_ACCESS_MITU_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Looks like we still won't be able to proceed after all.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}No need to rush, however. I'm sure the path will open at some point.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_YUKARI_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}Looks like this is the end of the line... How much more do we have to explore after this?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, not like we're gonna unlock it by dwelling on it. All we gotta do now is wait.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_JUNPEI_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2063 0 0}Couldn't we just bring a ladder or something? But it'd be a pretty nasty fall if we slipped, huh...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Guess we'll just have to wait and see. You'll just have to witness my mad skills next time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_ACCESS_MITU_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4060 0 0}It looks like we can't proceed any further. I'm sure the opportunity will present itself in time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_ACCESS_FUKA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5076 0 0}We can't go any further than this. Looks like we'll just have to wait.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_YUKARI_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}We hit a dead end... What now? Should we stop for tonight?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_YUKARI_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1062 0 0}I wonder why it's blocked off now when it's just gonna open up later...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_JUNPEI_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}Whew, what a climb! C'mon, let's head back and grab some grub.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_JUNPEI_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}I mean, who knows when it'll open up? How the heck does it even work anyways?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_SANADA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3093 0 0}This is as far as we can go, huh. Guess it's time to head back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_SANADA_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3062 0 0}Even if we can't press forward right now, we have plenty more to do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Like gaining combat experience. If we train now, we'll be ready for what comes later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_MITSURU_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Looks like this is as far as we can go for now. It's a good mark of our progress.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_MITSURU_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4122 0 0}It's strange. I've come to accept that it's the tower stopping us like this. This place is really unfathomable.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's almost as if it's luring us in... Am I overthinking it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_FUKA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5138 0 0}Koro-chan, that's the furthest we can go for now. We did a good job.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_AEGIS_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6060 0 0}It seems we can't proceed now. Let's wait for the time to come.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_AEGIS_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6012 0 0}It's frustrating, but "good things come with waiting," as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_AMADA_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7063 0 0}There's nothing we can do if the path is blocked. Shall we turn in for the night?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_AMADA_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7062 0 0}Looks like we've hit a stopping point. Does that mean we're taking a break from Tartarus for a bit?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}But, I guess we could still come back and train up by fighting the Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_ARAGAKI_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9108 0 0}We're just gonna have to wait. Time for ya to head to bed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_ARAGAKI_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9113 0 0}A dead end... Tch, wasting our time like this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Just gotta wait it out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_AEGIS_02_H
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6060 0 0}It's frustrating, but as the saying goes, "Good things come to those who wait."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_ACCESS_FUKA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5077 0 0}Looks like we can't go any further than this... The path will probably only open on the Promised Day...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Let's wait for January 31st while we prepare for the final battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_YUKARI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}Is there anything else we can do for now? ...I don't want to have any regrets.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_JUNPEI_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 9 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2117 0 0}You'll be waiting for us beyond this point, won't you? Ryoji... We're on our way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_SANADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3012 0 0}Now, all we have to do... is prepare ourselves for the moment, with no regrets.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_MITSURU_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4116 0 0}...There's still some time. We should do whatever we can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_FUKA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5116 0 0}Koro-chan seems to understand that we need to prepare ourselves for what's to come.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_AEGIS_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6003 0 0}This is as far as we can go for now, until the Promised Day. And what awaits us then...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 -1 -1 0 0}I can hardly imagine. Still, let's do everything we can.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_AMADA_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7119 0 0}{f 4 1}-san, please let me know if there's anything I can do to help![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_ACCESS_MITU_21
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}It's one thing just to know Tartarus changes daily, but to actually see it transform before our very own eyes...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Regardless, the path has opened. Let's try exploring further beyond that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}As for our next goal... I can only assume there'll be a similar obstruction up ahead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Let's aim for that. I'm counting on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_ACCESS_FUKA_20
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5073 0 0}These vibrations...! Please watch out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_ACCESS_FUKA_21
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5114 0 0}The blocked path opened up...! Now we can move forward![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}But, I wonder how it works... Tartarus is full of mysteries.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}The labyrinth continues on beyond this point.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}There'll probably be a similar obstruction further up.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Let's aim to reach that next![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_YUKARI_20
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1119 0 0}Argh, I wish it wouldn't start shaking all of a sudden. My heart almost stopped...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm worried about what else could be in store for us down the road... But since the path opened up, I guess we gotta press on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_JUNPEI_20
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2132 0 0}That was kinda exciting. It was almost like watching a giant robot transform![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I wonder what other gimmicks we'll see. Anyways, let's keep going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_SANADA_20
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3121 0 0}That was quite a contraption. What was its purpose...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}Hm, no point dwelling on it. All I need to do is keep moving forward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_MITSURU_20
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}Now, we can proceed further. It will only grow more treacherous from here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}We'll need to be on high alert. We're counting on you, {f 4 1}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_FUKA_20
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5113 0 0}Did that surprise you too, Koro-chan? We'll be counting on you, too![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_AEGIS_20
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6100 0 0}The change in structure was so surprising, I "jumped out of the skin," as they say.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Although, I don't fully understand that expression. Anyway, we should proceed on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_AMADA_20
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7120 0 0}It was a huge shock when the path started moving. I wonder how it works...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, not that I thought it was cool or anything![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_ARAGAKI_20
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9109 0 0}At least we can move on, yeah, but don't you think we're taking it a little slow?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}Shouldn't we be picking up the pace a little? Either way, I'll leave it up to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_AEGIS_20_H
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6100 0 0}I didn't expect the structure to change. My "jaw dropped."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Which is to say I was extremely surprised. Anyway, we should hurry on ahead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_ACCESS_MITU_30
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4098 0 0}Here it comes! Stay away from the stairs![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_ACCESS_MITU_31
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4115 0 0}Great. Now we can continue onward.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Expect the enemies to grow stronger. Stay alert, everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_ACCESS_FUKA_31
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5113 0 0}Looks like the shaking has subsided. Is everyone all right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}The path towards the staircase has opened up. You can advance further now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}We don't know what's waiting ahead, so please be careful going forward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_YUKARI_30
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1116 0 0}All right, let's go. I wonder what the next area's gonna be like.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_JUNPEI_30
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2132 0 0}Stay tuned for more from the mighty Junpei![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_SANADA_30
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3115 0 0}...Made it to the next stage. Let's see how far my fists can carry me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_MITSURU_30
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4115 0 0}It's thanks to all of you that we've made it this far.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_FUKA_30
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5116 0 0}Koro-chan is all pumped up too. You can do it, Koro-chan![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_AEGIS_30
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6106 0 0}It must take an enormous amount of energy to move a structure that large.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Although, such physical laws might not apply here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_AMADA_30
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7090 0 0}Another new area beyond this point, huh? I wonder what we'll find there...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_ARAGAKI_30
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9107 0 0}We're going to the next floor, right? Don't let your guard down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_JUNPEI_40
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2117 0 0}Alright, let's do this! Get ready to face us, Nyx![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_SANADA_40
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3116 0 0}...Let's go. Doesn't matter what's waiting for us ahead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GATE_RES_MITSURU_40
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4143 0 0}Let's go, for the sake of our future. We'll do this together, as a team.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_256F_FIRST
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}This should lead to the place Ryoji-kun told us about.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}I sense a strong presence on the floor above! But, this feeling is...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Please be careful! This is... Strega's presence![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}They're really here... Stay on high alert![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_256F_TWICE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}This should lead to the place Ryoji-kun told us about.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}I sense a strong presence on the floor above! But, this feeling...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}Please be careful! This is... Strega's presence![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}They're really here... Stay on high alert![n]{f 1 1}
